creator: flz@xbsd.org
text:
1. Can you show where LOCALBASE is used?

2. If you set NO_MTREE in your port, it's your responsibility to make
sure these directories exist and are deleted at deinstall time.

3. This is normal behaviour, if you're using alternative prefixes, set
ldconfig_local{,32}_dirs in /etc/rc.conf.

-- 
Florent Thoumie
flz@FreeBSD.org
FreeBSD Committer
